title: InfinityChat
description: The Ultimate Chat Formatting and Moderation plugin - Boost your server's appeal!
body:
InfinityChat - The Ultimate Chat Moderation And Formatting Solution

Features:

- Staff Chat (1.5.0+)
- Join particles (1.4.0+)
- AntiSwear
- AntiSpam
- AntiRepeat
- HexColors in Chat
- Support for Gradients, Rainbows and HexColors everywhere (in server versions 1.16 and above)!
- Join/Leave formatting
- Customizable messages and colors
- Join sounds Global/Local (1.7.0+)
- Leave sounds Global/Local (1.7.0+)
- Motd
- Dedicated Configuration Files
- Announce (1.7.0+) with /anc or /announce
- Local chat (1.6.0+)

Permissions:

- ic.staff
- ic.placeholderChat
- message.group - Group Permission
- ic.reload - Reload Plugin (/ic-reload)
- ic.cc - Clear Chat (/cc)
- ic.bypass - bypass chat cooldown limitation
- ic.announce - /announce command

Commands:

- /staff
- /ic-reload - reload config files
- /cc - clear chat
- (Some more aliases)
- /announce or /anc
- /l or /local - local chat

Discord:   https://discord.com/invite/sERSmAtHPe
